name: Accion Opportunity Fund
description_short: Accion Opportunity Fund is a free credit assistance provider based in San Jose, California. Rated 3.5/5 with 74 Google reviews, reflecting solid customer satisfaction.
description_long:
Accion Opportunity Fund is a free credit assistance provider serving clients in San Jose, California. Carrying a 3.5/5.0 Google rating from 74 reviews, Accion Opportunity Fund has an solid reputation among consumers in the San Jose area looking to access free credit counseling and financial guidance.

Operating as a loan agency, Accion Opportunity Fund provides a range of services for consumers seeking free credit assistance solutions. Additional information about their services and processes can typically be found on their website.

Non-profit and free credit assistance providers in San Jose offer valuable resources for consumers who need help but may not be able to afford paid services. Accion Opportunity Fund provides an important community service, and consumers should verify the organization's non-profit status and HUD-approval where applicable. Free counseling sessions can be a good starting point before committing to paid credit repair or debt relief programs.

Consumers in the San Jose, California area who are considering Accion Opportunity Fund should contact the company directly to discuss their specific situation and get current pricing information. As with any free credit assistance provider, it is advisable to compare multiple options, verify licensing and credentials, and read recent customer reviews before making a decision.
